data.name: 魅魔繁殖樂園
data.detailed_description:
性慾相當旺盛的男主收到來自美人名媛的誘惑！ ？
而她的本體是個魅魔，目的是要取得男主的精力。

但淫魔小穴卻被絕倫巨根給反殺，屈服於高潮並成為飛機杯。
此外，她的母親跟妹妹也成為了餌食。將人類視為糧食，有著下流身體的魅魔，竟然成為男主專用的飛機杯種族。

歡迎來到 Succubus Sexland，您是這裡的VIP！享受由三個性感魅魔策劃的主題公園，遊樂設施就是她們自己，她們所有人都渴望坐在您的“明星景點”上搖擺。


特點:
  • 從原裝日本VN本地化。
  • 所有魅魔帶有日文語音。
  • 高清16:9和4:3圖質。
  • 多小時的內容。
  • 帶有音樂和音效。
  • 帶有角色動態。
  • 帶有收藏展覽。
  • 23個與魅魔H的劇情。

「魅魔繁殖樂園」是一個英文本地化的VN，由著名日本製作室 Norn/Miel所創作。我們cherry kiss櫻桃社試圖將日本遊戲帶到全世界。

**注意**
所有角色的描述和圖片都屬成人並沒有任何未成年人物用於這遊戲裡。

data.name: My Ass Pass to Succubus Sexland!
data.detailed_description:
Meisa, Rumi, and Riam are the three biggest (in more ways than one) names in high society, way out of the grasp of your humble visual novel protagonist, unless...

While lugging around boxes at a catering event these three beauties are attending, the mischievous Meisa catches a glimpse of your package and decides you'd make the perfect prey for a late-night succubus snack! However, she wasn't dealing with your average visual novel protagonist anymore, oh no, you're the legendary MIEL visual novel protagonist!

After one shot, Meisa has gone from a seductress supreme to the perfect pet, ready to do whatever her new Master says. Your first order of business is getting your hands on Rumi and Riam to complete the big titty trifecta, and after that who knows? Apparently, there is a whole world of succubi out there who could use a man like you!


  • Translated version of the original Japanese Visual Novel
  • Meisa, Rumi and Riam are fully voiced with original Japanese dialogue
  • Original artwork HD upscaled with 16:9 and 4:3 variants
  • Hours of story content
  • Audio including music and special effects
  • Enhanced with character sprite animations
  • Gallery and Scene selections
  • A Scene Studio to view all the beautifully drawn sprites and backgrounds
  • 23 wild rides to enjoy at Succubus Sexland.

My Ass Pass to Succubus Sexland! Is the English localization of a Visual Novel originally created by prolific Japanese developer Miel. We at Cherry Kiss aim to provide an authentic Japanese Visual Novel experience to gamers outside of Japan.

** PLEASE NOTE **
All characters described and visually represented in this game are over 18 years of age, and no actual, nor identifiable minor was used in the production of this game.

data.short_description: Welcome to Succubus Sexland, where you're the VIP! Enjoy a theme park curated by three sexy succubi’s, featuring rides made up of all their slutty succubus friends who are dying for a ride on your 'star attraction'.
data.supported_languages: English, Spanish - Spain, Spanish - Latin America, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
